basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Research Fellow and Project Associate Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II)
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Calicut. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M. Tech in relevant discipline with GATE/NET qualified or B. Tech in relevant discipline with valid GATE/NET score, B. Tech in relevant discipline, B. Tech in relevant discipline with 02 years experience
qualification.details: For JRF: M. Tech in relevant discipline with GATE/NET qualified or B. Tech in relevant discipline with valid GATE/NET score For PA I: B. Tech in relevant discipline For PA II: B. Tech in relevant discipline with 02 years experience

vacancy_details.Post Name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate-I (PA I)/ Project Associate-II (PA II)

post_wise_breakdown.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate-I (PA I)/ Project Associate-II (PA II)

salary_details.pay_scale: For JRF: 37000+HRA (20%) For PA I: 31000+HRA (20%) For PA II: 33000+HRA (20%)
salary_details.details: For JRF: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (20%) For PA I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (20%) For PA II: Rs. 33,000/- + HRA (20%)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Calicut Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Calicut Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Calicut Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.post_name: Junior Research Fellow/ Project Associate-I (PA I)/ Project Associate-II (PA II)

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: For JRF: M. Tech in relevant discipline with GATE/NET qualified or B. Tech in relevant discipline with valid GATE/NET score For PA I: B. Tech in relevant discipline For PA II: B. Tech in relevant discipline with 02 years experience

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: For JRF: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA (20%) For PA I: Rs. 31,000/- + HRA (20%) For PA II: Rs. 33,000/- + HRA (20%)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the application for the NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II posts is 20 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) posts in this recruitment drive by NIT Calicut.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II posts involves shortlisting of candidates based on their applications, followed by an offline interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for these posts?
faq.answer: For JRF, candidates need M. Tech with GATE/NET or B. Tech with GATE/NET. For PA I, B. Tech is required. For PA II, B. Tech with 2 years experience is necessary in the relevant discipline.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NIT Calicut Junior Research Fellow/Project Associate posts. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The salary for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) at NIT Calicut is Rs. 37,000/- per month plus HRA (20%). Specific details are available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the interview for NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II posts be conducted?
faq.answer: The interview for the NIT Calicut JRF/PA I/PA II posts will be conducted offline. The exact date for the interview is 27 July 2026, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these positions at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF)/Project Associate-I (PA I)/Project Associate-II (PA II) positions at NIT Calicut is Contractual. The duration of the contract will be specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be attached with the email application?
faq.answer: Candidates should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs, along with their complete bio-data.
